def positive_asyncio_get_event_loop_at_module_scope():
    rule_id = "asyncio_get_event_loop_at_module_scope"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "asyncio.get_event_loop() or get_running_loop() called at module import scope outside any function."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
